creator: marietto2008@gmail.com
text:
Why this bug has been closed,as it seems that it hasn't been fixed ?

[marietto@marietto ~/Downloads]==> wine kodi-21.0-Omega-x64.exe 
wine [wine-9.0] and wine64 [wine-8.0.2] versions do not match!

Try updating 32-bit wine with
	/usr/local/share/wine/pkg32.sh upgrade

[marietto@marietto ~/Downloads]==> uname -aKU

FreeBSD marietto 14.0-RELEASE-p6 FreeBSD 14.0-RELEASE-p6 #0: Tue Mar 26 20:26:20 UTC 2024     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC amd64 1400097 1400097
